goal: Start moving balanced-MoE policy into the MORI vendor snapshot as an importable native MORI EP feature.

source_changes.change: Added BalancedMoePlan, BalancedMoeHotExpert, BalancedMoeSourcePartition, MindSpeed-style greedy hot-expert planner, distributed count gather helper, and source-side remote-hot partition builder.
Exported the balanced-MoE planner API through mori.ops.
Added CPU tests for greedy hot-expert selection, threshold rejection, and source-rank remote-hot partition offsets.
TorchTitan standard-EP balanced-MoE planner now prefers mori.ops.balanced_moe when available, with the old local planner kept as fallback.

reference_mechanism.policy: Repeatedly select the max-count expert on the max-load EP rank, model selected expert rows as source/helper-rank execution, and reduce hot expert weight gradients back to the true owner.

next_steps: Use build_source_partition in TorchTitan so the route-mask/remote-hot tensor construction is MORI-owned.
Add a MORI EP API that accepts BalancedMoePlan owner-compact metadata and launches normal/cold compact dispatch plus helper-hot compact pack.
Benchmark standard EP hot-helper versus MORI native balanced-MoE on a small 4x fit surface before trying the 8x throughput gate.
Promote only after materialized tok/GPU/s, TFLOPs/GPU, and memory improve on flash_12layer_ceiling_probe.
